title: Continuum — KV Cache TTL for Agent Scheduling
summary_zh: 提供最詳細的 agent 流量實證分析，使用 SWE-Bench 和 BFCL trace。發現大多數 tool call 在 <2 秒內完成且高度可預測；scheduling bubbles 累積達 baseline 端到端延遲的 58.2%。開源了首個公開 agentic inference benchmark trace。
summary_en: Provides the most detailed empirical analysis of agent traffic, using SWE-Bench and BFCL traces. Finds that most tool calls complete in <2 seconds and are highly predictable; scheduling bubbles accumulate to 58.2% of baseline end-to-end latency. Open-sources the first public agentic inference benchmark traces.

title: The Cost of Dynamic Reasoning
summary_zh: 首次全面的系統級分析，比較 ReAct、Reflexion、LATS、LLMCompiler 四種 agent 框架。揭示「迫在眉睫的永續性危機」：agent 雖以增加計算換取精確度，但出現急劇遞減的回報、不斷擴大的延遲變異、以及數量級的成本增長。
summary_en: First comprehensive system-level analysis comparing four agent frameworks: ReAct, Reflexion, LATS, and LLMCompiler. Reveals an "imminent sustainability crisis": agents trade compute for accuracy, but exhibit sharply diminishing returns, widening latency variance, and order-of-magnitude cost increases.

title: A CPU-Centric Perspective on Agentic AI
summary_zh: 剖析五種代表性工作負載（Haystack RAG、Toolformer、ChemCrow、Langchain、SWE-Agent），揭示被忽略的瓶頸：CPU 上的工具處理可消耗高達 90.6% 的總延遲。提出 CGAM 和 MAWS，在 Intel Emerald Rapids + NVIDIA B200 上實現 2.1× P50 延遲降低。
summary_en: Profiles five representative workloads (Haystack RAG, Toolformer, ChemCrow, Langchain, SWE-Agent), revealing an overlooked bottleneck: CPU-side tool processing can consume up to 90.6% of total latency. Proposes CGAM and MAWS, achieving 2.1x P50 latency reduction on Intel Emerald Rapids + NVIDIA B200.

title: PrefillShare — Shared Prefill for Multi-LLM
summary_zh: 量化多模型 agent 管線（Planner→Coder→Reviewer）中的冗餘 prefill，提出跨模型共享 prefill 模組以實現 KV 重用。
summary_en: Quantifies redundant prefill in multi-model agent pipelines (Planner->Coder->Reviewer) and proposes cross-model shared prefill modules for KV reuse.

title: AgentInfer — Co-Design of Inference Architecture
summary_zh: 將 agent 延遲分解為 LLM 呼叫、工具呼叫、檢索和環境互動，提出推理架構與系統的共同設計框架。
summary_en: Decomposes agent latency into LLM calls, tool calls, retrieval, and environment interaction, proposing a co-design framework for inference architecture and systems.

title: DistServe — PD Disaggregation for Goodput
summary_zh: 奠定 PD disaggregation 基礎，獨立優化各階段的資源分配和並行策略。7.4× 吞吐量或 12.6× 更緊的 SLO。到 2025 年幾乎所有生產級系統都採用了此架構。限制：FCFS 排程、無多輪 KV cache 重用。
summary_en: Establishes the foundation for PD disaggregation, independently optimizing resource allocation and parallelism strategies for each phase. 7.4x throughput or 12.6x tighter SLO. By 2025, virtually all production-grade systems have adopted this architecture. Limitation: FCFS scheduling, no multi-turn KV cache reuse.

title: Splitwise — Phase Splitting for LLM Inference
summary_zh: 描繪各階段的硬體特性：prefill 為計算瓶頸、decode 為記憶體頻寬瓶頸，功耗特性各異。實現異質硬體部署（H100 prefill + A100 decode），1.4× 吞吐量、低 20% 成本。
summary_en: Characterizes the hardware profiles of each phase: prefill is compute-bound, decode is memory-bandwidth-bound, with distinct power characteristics. Enables heterogeneous hardware deployment (H100 prefill + A100 decode), 1.4x throughput, 20% lower cost.

title: Mooncake — KVCache-centric Architecture
summary_zh: Kimi（Moonshot AI）的生產級 serving 平台，每日處理 1000 億+ tokens。利用未充分使用的 CPU/DRAM/SSD 構建分散式 KV cache pool，Transfer Engine 在 4×200 Gbps RoCE 上達 87 GB/s。已整合至 vLLM、SGLang、TensorRT-LLM。
summary_en: Production-grade serving platform for Kimi (Moonshot AI), processing 100 billion+ tokens daily. Leverages underutilized CPU/DRAM/SSD to build a distributed KV cache pool; Transfer Engine achieves 87 GB/s over 4x200 Gbps RoCE. Integrated into vLLM, SGLang, TensorRT-LLM.

title: DualPath — Storage Bandwidth Bottleneck Fix
summary_zh: 最直接相關的 agentic disaggregation 論文。發現在 KV cache 命中率 ≥95% 時，prefill 端的 storage NIC 飽和而 decode 端閒置。提出 storage→decode→prefill 的新 RDMA 路徑，1.87× 離線吞吐量、1.96× 線上吞吐量。挑戰了 DistServe 時代的計算中心優化觀點。
summary_en: The most directly relevant agentic disaggregation paper. Discovers that at KV cache hit rates >=95%, the prefill-side storage NIC saturates while the decode side idles. Proposes a new RDMA path from storage->decode->prefill, achieving 1.87x offline throughput, 1.96x online throughput. Challenges the compute-centric optimization view of the DistServe era.

title: TaiChi — Hybrid Aggregation-Disaggregation
summary_zh: 嚴格證明純聚合或純分離都非普遍最優。提出 P-heavy/D-heavy GPU instance 和「延遲轉移」策略——選擇性降低已滿足 SLO 請求的延遲以幫助高風險請求，77% goodput 提升。
summary_en: Rigorously proves that neither pure aggregation nor pure disaggregation is universally optimal. Proposes P-heavy/D-heavy GPU instances and a "latency transfer" strategy -- selectively degrading latency of SLO-met requests to help at-risk requests, achieving 77% goodput improvement.

title: NVIDIA Dynamo — Smart Router + KV Manager
summary_zh: 最具生產就緒性的 PD disaggregation 框架，具備明確的 agentic 功能：radix-tree KV cache 追蹤的 Smart Router、SLA-based 動態 P/D scaling 的 Planner、分層 offloading 的 KV Block Manager。v1.0 新增 cache pinning TTL（nvext.cache_control）和 LangChain 整合。GB300 NVL72 上 30× 吞吐量。
summary_en: The most production-ready PD disaggregation framework with explicit agentic capabilities: Smart Router with radix-tree KV cache tracking, Planner for SLA-based dynamic P/D scaling, KV Block Manager for hierarchical offloading. v1.0 adds cache pinning TTL (nvext.cache_control) and LangChain integration. 30x throughput on GB300 NVL72.

title: TraCT — CXL Shared Memory KV Cache
summary_zh: 使用 CXL（Compute Express Link）共享記憶體作為無網路的 KV 傳輸基底，透過直接 load/store 操作實現機櫃級 KV cache 共享。TTFT 降低 9.8×、P99 延遲 6.2×。CXL Type-3 設備仍處預生產階段。
summary_en: Uses CXL (Compute Express Link) shared memory as a network-free KV transfer substrate, enabling rack-scale KV cache sharing via direct load/store operations. 9.8x TTFT reduction, 6.2x P99 latency. CXL Type-3 devices are still in pre-production stage.

title: WindServe — Stream-based Dynamic Scheduling
summary_zh: 基於 stream 的 disaggregation，在 GPU instance 內實現非同步並行執行。動態 prefill dispatch 和無停頓重排程。4.28× TTFT 中位數、1.5× TPOT P99。
summary_en: Stream-based disaggregation enabling asynchronous parallel execution within GPU instances. Dynamic prefill dispatch and stall-free rescheduling. 4.28x median TTFT, 1.5x TPOT P99.

title: NanoFlow — Nano-grained Pipeline Parallelism
summary_zh: 透過 nano-grained pipeline parallelism 實現接近最優吞吐量。OSDI'25 Best Paper。
summary_en: Achieves near-optimal throughput via nano-grained pipeline parallelism. OSDI'25 Best Paper.

title: FlowKV — Low-Latency KV Transfer
summary_zh: 透過記憶體對齊實現 96% KV 傳輸延遲降低，配合負載感知排程。
summary_en: Achieves 96% KV transfer latency reduction through memory alignment, combined with load-aware scheduling.

title: PPD — Routing Append-Prefills to Decode Nodes
summary_zh: 將 append-prefill 路由到 KV cache 所在的 decode 節點，降低第 2 輪以後的 TTFT 達 68%。
summary_en: Routes append-prefills to decode nodes where the KV cache resides, reducing TTFT by 68% from the second turn onward.

title: DuetServe — Adaptive GPU Multiplexing
summary_zh: 透過 SM-level spatial multiplexing 實現 GPU 內部的 intra-GPU disaggregation。
summary_en: Achieves intra-GPU disaggregation via SM-level spatial multiplexing.

title: BanaServe — Layer-level Weight Migration
summary_zh: Layer-level weight migration，在 vLLM 上實現 1.2–3.9× 吞吐量。
summary_en: Layer-level weight migration, achieving 1.2–3.9x throughput on vLLM.

title: vLLM — PagedAttention
summary_zh: 引入 OS 啟發的虛擬記憶體和分頁機制用於 KV cache，將 tensor 分割為固定大小 block 並使用 copy-on-write 共享。近零記憶體浪費、2–4× 吞吐量提升。奠定所有後續 KV cache 系統的基礎。限制：單 GPU、無跨請求重用、基本 FCFS eviction。
summary_en: Introduces OS-inspired virtual memory and paging for KV cache, splitting tensors into fixed-size blocks with copy-on-write sharing. Near-zero memory waste, 2–4x throughput improvement. Establishes the foundation for all subsequent KV cache systems. Limitations: single GPU, no cross-request reuse, basic FCFS eviction.

title: SGLang — RadixAttention
summary_zh: 以 radix tree 儲存 KV cache 實現跨 LLM 呼叫的自動重用，支援 few-shot、多輪、tree-of-thought 和 agent 模板模式。Cache-aware scheduling 優先處理較長共享前綴的請求，達 5× 吞吐量。默認 LRU eviction 對 agentic 次優（未來激活可預測）。
summary_en: Stores KV cache in a radix tree for automatic reuse across LLM calls, supporting few-shot, multi-turn, tree-of-thought, and agent template patterns. Cache-aware scheduling prioritizes requests with longer shared prefixes, achieving 5x throughput. Default LRU eviction is suboptimal for agentic workloads (future activations are predictable).

title: LMCache — Multi-tier KV Storage Layer
summary_zh: 首個開源 KV caching layer，支援跨查詢前綴重用和 PD disaggregation。跨 GPU HBM、CPU DRAM、磁碟、遠端儲存（Redis、Mooncake），達 15× 吞吐量。Pin API 提供 agent session 的顯式保留控制。已整合至 vLLM 生產級堆疊。
summary_en: First open-source KV caching layer supporting cross-query prefix reuse and PD disaggregation. Spans GPU HBM, CPU DRAM, disk, and remote storage (Redis, Mooncake), achieving 15x throughput. Pin API provides explicit retention control for agent sessions. Integrated into the vLLM production stack.

title: CachedAttention — Hierarchical KV Persistence
summary_zh: 為多輪對話實作分層 KV cache 持久化（DRAM + 磁碟），具備位置編碼解耦和層級預載入。在 ShareGPT trace 上達 86–90% cache 命中率。
summary_en: Implements hierarchical KV cache persistence (DRAM + disk) for multi-turn conversations, with position encoding decoupling and layer-level preloading. Achieves 86–90% cache hit rate on ShareGPT traces.

title: llm-d — K8s-native KV Cache Indexer
summary_zh: Red Hat/IBM/Google 的 Kubernetes 原生分散式推理。全域 KV-Cache Indexer 的 Precise Prefix-Cache Scorer，87.4% cache 命中率、88% 更快 TTFT。Session affinity 防止多輪 agent 的 cache thrashing。v0.5 新增 cache-aware LoRA routing。
summary_en: Kubernetes-native distributed inference by Red Hat/IBM/Google. Global KV-Cache Indexer with Precise Prefix-Cache Scorer, 87.4% cache hit rate, 88% faster TTFT. Session affinity prevents cache thrashing for multi-turn agents. v0.5 adds cache-aware LoRA routing.

title: CacheGen — KV Cache Compression Codec
summary_zh: 使用客製化 codec 將 KV cache tensor 編碼為緊湊 bitstream，利用分佈特性實現 3.5–4.3× 壓縮、TTFT 降低 3.2–3.7×。分散式節點間 agent context 傳輸的關鍵技術。
summary_en: Encodes KV cache tensors into compact bitstreams using a custom codec, exploiting distributional properties for 3.5–4.3x compression and 3.2–3.7x TTFT reduction. A key technique for transferring agent context across distributed nodes.

title: CacheBlend — Non-prefix KV Cache Reuse
summary_zh: 實現非前綴文本 chunk 的預計算 KV cache 重用，透過選擇性重計算 5–18% 邊界 token 恢復跨 chunk 注意力。2.2–3.3× TTFT、2.8–5× 吞吐量。直接適用於動態組裝多文件 context 的 RAG agent。
summary_en: Enables reuse of precomputed KV caches for non-prefix text chunks by selectively recomputing 5–18% boundary tokens to recover cross-chunk attention. 2.2–3.3x TTFT, 2.8–5x throughput. Directly applicable to RAG agents that dynamically assemble multi-document context.

title: EPIC — Position-Independent Caching
summary_zh: 以 compile-link 類比形式化 Position-Independent Caching：chunk 被「編譯」（獨立 KV cache）再「連結」（邊界選擇性重計算）。8× TTFT、7× 吞吐量。對文件排序在不同調用間變化的 agent 特別有價值。
summary_en: Formalizes Position-Independent Caching using a compile-link analogy: chunks are "compiled" (independent KV cache) then "linked" (selective boundary recomputation). 8x TTFT, 7x throughput. Particularly valuable for agents where document ordering varies across invocations.

title: IC-Cache — Semantic In-context Caching
summary_zh: 語義級快取，利用歷史請求-回應對作為 in-context example 增強較小模型。兩階段 example 選擇和成本感知路由，1.4–5.9× 吞吐量、28–71% 延遲降低。利用 70%+ 的 agent 查詢有語義相似歷史對應的觀察。
summary_en: Semantic-level caching that uses historical request-response pairs as in-context examples to augment smaller models. Two-stage example selection and cost-aware routing, 1.4–5.9x throughput, 28–71% latency reduction. Exploits the observation that 70%+ of agent queries have semantically similar historical counterparts.

title: KVFlow — Workflow-aware Prefix Caching
summary_zh: 首個工作流感知 KV cache 管理框架。將 agent 執行抽象為 Agent Step Graph，用「steps-to-execution」值估計未來激活的時間接近度，以工作流感知優先級取代 LRU。完全重疊的 CPU→GPU prefetch 消除 cache miss stall。1.83×（單工作流）和 2.19×（並行工作流）加速。
summary_en: First workflow-aware KV cache management framework. Abstracts agent execution as an Agent Step Graph, using "steps-to-execution" values to estimate temporal proximity of future activations, replacing LRU with workflow-aware priorities. Fully overlapped CPU->GPU prefetch eliminates cache miss stalls. 1.83x (single workflow) and 2.19x (parallel workflows) speedup.

title: Marconi — Prefix Caching for Hybrid LLMs
summary_zh: 首個為混合 LLM（Attention + SSM）設計的 prefix caching 系統。Admission/eviction 策略預測重用可能性並權衡計算節省 vs 記憶體佔用，34.4× token 命中率。在 SWE-Agent/SWE-Bench agentic 工作負載上評估。
summary_en: First prefix caching system designed for hybrid LLMs (Attention + SSM). Admission/eviction policies predict reuse likelihood and weigh compute savings vs memory footprint, 34.4x token hit rate. Evaluated on SWE-Agent/SWE-Bench agentic workloads.

title: DiffKV — Differentiated KV Memory
summary_zh: 區分 Key 和 Value 的記憶體管理（不同的存取模式），並行 KV compaction。SOSP'25 Best Paper。
summary_en: Differentiates memory management for Keys and Values (different access patterns) with parallel KV compaction. SOSP'25 Best Paper.

title: Jenga — Heterogeneous KV Embeddings
summary_zh: 處理 MLA 風格模型中的異質 KV embedding。已合併至 vLLM 主幹。
summary_en: Handles heterogeneous KV embeddings in MLA-style models. Merged into vLLM mainline.

title: Pie — Programmable Serving System
summary_zh: 可程式化 serving 系統，透過「inferlets」實現自定義的 per-application KV cache 策略。Yale。
summary_en: Programmable serving system enabling custom per-application KV cache policies via "inferlets". Yale.

title: DeepSeek MLA — Multi-Head Latent Attention
summary_zh: 將 KV tensor 壓縮至低維 latent space，減少 93.3% KV cache。用於 DeepSeek-V2/V3/R1。對最大化並發 agent session 至關重要。
summary_en: Compresses KV tensors to a low-dimensional latent space, reducing KV cache by 93.3%. Used in DeepSeek-V2/V3/R1. Critical for maximizing concurrent agent sessions.

title: MHA2MLA — Retrofitting MLA
summary_zh: 讓現有 MHA/GQA 模型無需從頭預訓練即可改造為 MLA，透過 partial-RoPE 移除和 joint SVD 近似。
summary_en: Enables existing MHA/GQA models to be retrofitted to MLA without retraining from scratch, via partial-RoPE removal and joint SVD approximation.

title: Oaken — Hybrid KV Cache Quantization
summary_zh: 混合 online-offline KV cache 量化，ISCA'25。
summary_en: Hybrid online-offline KV cache quantization, ISCA'25.

title: TokenLake — Unified Segment Prefix Cache
summary_zh: 聚合 GPU 記憶體為統一的 segment-level prefix cache pool，用於細粒度彈性長 context 服務。
summary_en: Aggregates GPU memory into a unified segment-level prefix cache pool for fine-grained elastic long-context serving.

title: InferCept — KV Cache Preserve for Tool Calls
summary_zh: 引入更簡單的「preserve」操作，在 tool call 之間釘選 KV cache。後續工作（Continuum、KVFlow、ThunderAgent）指出關鍵限制：靜態 pin 策略在高變異性工具呼叫時失敗——長時間或失敗的呼叫無限期阻塞 GPU 記憶體。
summary_en: Introduces the simpler "preserve" operation, pinning KV cache between tool calls. Subsequent work (Continuum, KVFlow, ThunderAgent) identifies a key limitation: static pin policies fail under high-variance tool calls -- long or failed calls block GPU memory indefinitely.

title: Concur — AIMD Agent Admission Control
summary_zh: 辨識 batch agentic inference 中的「middle-phase thrashing」：長壽命 agent 在並發壓力下 cache 效率崩潰。提出受網路壅塞控制啟發的 AIMD-based agent 准入控制，在高並發下優於 Continuum。
summary_en: Identifies "middle-phase thrashing" in batch agentic inference: long-lived agents see cache efficiency collapse under concurrency pressure. Proposes AIMD-based agent admission control inspired by network congestion control, outperforming Continuum under high concurrency.

title: ThunderAgent — Program-aware Pause/Restore
summary_zh: Program-aware inference，透過遲滯水位線（hysteresis watermarks）進行週期性記憶體監控和 pause/restore 操作。當 KV cache thrashing 即將發生時，主動暫停活躍 agent。在可預測 tool-call 時間的工作流上優於 vLLM 和 Continuum 2.43–3.56×。
summary_en: Program-aware inference with periodic memory monitoring and pause/restore operations using hysteresis watermarks. Proactively pauses active agents when KV cache thrashing is imminent. Outperforms vLLM and Continuum by 2.43–3.56x on workflows with predictable tool-call times.

title: SideQuest — Model-driven KV Eviction
summary_zh: 採取根本不同的方法：使用推理模型本身透過輔助「side quest」任務決定驅逐哪些 KV entry。解決了多步驟推理中 token 重要性非單調的根本問題。降低深度研究 agent 的峰值 token 使用 65%。
summary_en: Takes a fundamentally different approach: uses the reasoning model itself to decide which KV entries to evict via auxiliary "side quest" tasks. Addresses the fundamental problem that token importance is non-monotonic during multi-step reasoning. Reduces peak token usage by 65% for deep-research agents.

title: Autellix — Program-level DAG Scheduling
summary_zh: 首個將 agent 程式視為一等公民的 serving 系統（UC Berkeley & Google DeepMind）。將程式形式化為動態 DAG，引入 PLAS 排程（優先服務累計服務時間較低的程式）和 ATLAS（多執行緒版本，考慮關鍵路徑）。Locality-aware 負載均衡器利用 KV cache co-location，4–15× 吞吐量。
summary_en: First serving system to treat agent programs as first-class citizens (UC Berkeley & Google DeepMind). Formalizes programs as dynamic DAGs, introducing PLAS scheduling (prioritizes programs with lower cumulative service time) and ATLAS (multi-threaded version considering critical paths). Locality-aware load balancer exploits KV cache co-location, 4–15x throughput.

title: Cortex — Stage-isolated Resource Pooling
summary_zh: Stage isolation——為每個工作流階段（如 SQL 生成、錯誤修復、執行）配置獨立資源池，各有自己的排程器、cache 和 scaling 策略。Orchestrator 追蹤 per-request SLO slack。
summary_en: Stage isolation -- provisioning independent resource pools for each workflow stage (e.g., SQL generation, error correction, execution), each with its own scheduler, cache, and scaling policy. Orchestrator tracks per-request SLO slack.

title: Murakkab — Declarative Workflow Optimization
summary_zh: Microsoft Research 提出宣告式抽象，將工作流規格與執行配置解耦。Profile-guided 優化器和自適應 runtime 聯合管理模型選擇和硬體映射，2.8× GPU 使用量降低 vs LangGraph。
summary_en: Microsoft Research proposes declarative abstractions decoupling workflow specification from execution configuration. Profile-guided optimizer and adaptive runtime jointly manage model selection and hardware mapping, 2.8x GPU usage reduction vs LangGraph.

title: Agent.xpu — On-device SoC Scheduling
summary_zh: 首個面向異質 SoC（CPU、iGPU、NPU）的 on-device agentic 引擎。Prefill 分配到 NPU、decode 分配到 iGPU。4.6× 更低延遲（reactive）、1.6–6.8× 更高吞吐量（proactive）。Intel Core Ultra 平台。
summary_en: First on-device agentic engine for heterogeneous SoCs (CPU, iGPU, NPU). Assigns prefill to NPU, decode to iGPU. 4.6x lower latency (reactive), 1.6–6.8x higher throughput (proactive). Intel Core Ultra platform.

title: Preble — Cluster-level KV-aware Scheduling
summary_zh: 將 prefix caching 擴展到叢集級，E2 排程演算法共同優化 KV 重用和負載均衡。全域排程器的 prompt-aware 負載指標考量驅逐成本和共享潛力，1.5–14.5× 平均延遲、2–10× P99。
summary_en: Extends prefix caching to cluster level, with E2 scheduling algorithm that co-optimizes KV reuse and load balancing. Global scheduler's prompt-aware load metrics account for eviction costs and sharing potential, 1.5–14.5x mean latency, 2–10x P99.

title: AI Metropolis — Out-of-order Multi-Agent
summary_zh: 將 out-of-order 執行概念應用於多 agent 模擬，動態追蹤 agent 間依賴以打破保守同步屏障。1.3–4.15× 加速。
summary_en: Applies out-of-order execution concepts to multi-agent simulations, dynamically tracking inter-agent dependencies to break conservative synchronization barriers. 1.3–4.15x speedup.

title: Helium — Query-plan Agentic Workflows
summary_zh: 將 agentic 工作流建模為資料庫查詢計劃，LLM 作為一等運算元，搭配 template-aware radix-tree 排程。
summary_en: Models agentic workflows as database query plans with LLMs as first-class operators, combined with template-aware radix-tree scheduling.

title: Sherlock — Reliable Agentic Workflow
summary_zh: 結合選擇性驗證與投機執行，用於可靠的 agentic serving。執行時間降低 48.7%。
summary_en: Combines selective verification with speculative execution for reliable agentic serving. Reduces execution time by 48.7%.

title: Aragog — Just-in-Time Model Routing
summary_zh: 在執行期間按輸入自適應（而非按工作流），實現 Just-in-Time 模型路由以擴展 agentic 工作流。
summary_en: Adapts per-input at execution time (rather than per-workflow) for Just-in-Time model routing to scale agentic workflows.

title: SOLA — State-aware SLO Scheduling
summary_zh: State-aware SLO 排程用於 LLM serving。MLSys'25。
summary_en: State-aware SLO scheduling for LLM serving. MLSys'25.

title: SuperServe — Fine-grained Serving
summary_zh: 面對不可預測工作負載的細粒度推理服務。NSDI'25。
summary_en: Fine-grained inference serving for unpredictable workloads. NSDI'25.

title: LeCaR — Regret-based LRU/LFU Weighting
summary_zh: 引入 regret-minimization 動態加權 LRU 和 LFU。每次 cache miss 時根據累積 regret 選擇策略。在 cache 相對工作集較小時，優於 ARC >18×。CACHEUS 的基礎。
summary_en: Introduces regret-minimization to dynamically weight LRU and LFU. On each cache miss, selects policy based on cumulative regret. Outperforms ARC by >18x when cache is small relative to the working set. Foundation for CACHEUS.

title: CACHEUS — Fully Adaptive Cache Replacement
summary_zh: 擴展 LeCaR 至完全自適應，透過 gradient-based stochastic hill climbing 消除所有靜態超參數。引入工作負載分類和 SR-LRU/CR-LFU 新 expert。在 329 工作負載上的 17,766 次模擬中評估。
summary_en: Extends LeCaR to fully adaptive, eliminating all static hyperparameters via gradient-based stochastic hill climbing. Introduces workload classification and new SR-LRU/CR-LFU experts. Evaluated across 17,766 simulations on 329 workloads.

title: RLCache — Multi-task RL Cache Management
summary_zh: 將快取管理建模為多任務 RL 問題，含三個 agent：快取決策、TTL 估計、驅逐。TTL 估計 agent 學習最優 time-to-live——直接相關於 agentic semantic caching。
summary_en: Models cache management as a multi-task RL problem with three agents: caching decision, TTL estimation, and eviction. The TTL estimation agent learns optimal time-to-live -- directly relevant to agentic semantic caching.

title: Cold-RL — Offline RL for NGINX Eviction
summary_zh: 首個生產級 RL 驅逐演算法，整合至 NGINX。Dueling DQN 透過 ONNX sidecar 在嚴格 500µs timeout 內運作。命中率從 0.14 提升到 0.35（146% 提升），CPU 開銷 <2%。
summary_en: First production-grade RL eviction algorithm, integrated into NGINX. Dueling DQN operates within a strict 500us timeout via ONNX sidecar. Hit rate improves from 0.14 to 0.35 (146% increase), with CPU overhead <2%.

title: KV Policy — Per-head RL KV Eviction
summary_zh: 將 KV cache 驅逐重構為 RL ranking 問題，每個 attention head 訓練獨立的輕量級 agent。Per-head 專業化適應不同的注意力模式——部分 head 追蹤近期性、部分追蹤實體引用。
summary_en: Reformulates KV cache eviction as an RL ranking problem, training independent lightweight agents per attention head. Per-head specialization adapts to different attention patterns -- some heads track recency, others track entity references.

title: Semantic Cache Bandit — MAB for Cache Eviction
summary_zh: 首個在未知查詢和成本分佈下的語義快取驅逐原則性框架。三種設定：oracle（Reverse Greedy）、offline（CUCB-SC）、online adaptive（CLCB-SC-LS）。直接連接 bandit 理論到 LLM serving cache 管理。
summary_en: First principled framework for semantic cache eviction under unknown query and cost distributions. Three settings: oracle (Reverse Greedy), offline (CUCB-SC), and online adaptive (CLCB-SC-LS). Directly connects bandit theory to LLM serving cache management.

title: Attention-Gate — In-context KV Eviction
summary_zh: 注入輕量級模組實現動態 per-head KV 驅逐。
summary_en: Injects a lightweight module for dynamic per-head KV eviction.

title: NACL — General KV Cache Eviction
summary_zh: 使用 proxy-token scoring 搭配 head-wise 隨機驅逐的通用 KV cache 驅逐框架。
summary_en: General KV cache eviction framework using proxy-token scoring with head-wise random eviction.

title: LookaheadKV — Future Attention Prediction
summary_zh: 使用可學習特殊 token 預測未來注意力模式以指導 KV 驅逐。Samsung Labs。
summary_en: Uses learnable special tokens to predict future attention patterns and guide KV eviction. Samsung Labs.

title: Ada-KV — Adaptive Per-head Budget
summary_zh: 自適應 per-head budget 分配用於 KV cache 驅逐。NeurIPS'25。
summary_en: Adaptive per-head budget allocation for KV cache eviction. NeurIPS'25.

title: Sarathi-Serve — Chunked Prefills
summary_zh: 引入 chunked prefill 將長 prompt 分割為等大小 chunk，將 decode 請求搭載到 prefill batch 上。Stall-free 排程實現 2.6–5.6× serving capacity。與 PD disaggregation 形成根本性取捨：chunked prefill 在一個 GPU 上混合階段（更好的記憶體局部性、無 KV 傳輸），disaggregation 則分離階段（更好的階段隔離、KV 傳輸開銷）。
summary_en: Introduces chunked prefill, splitting long prompts into equal-size chunks and piggybacking decode requests onto prefill batches. Stall-free scheduling achieves 2.6–5.6x serving capacity. Represents a fundamental trade-off against PD disaggregation: chunked prefill mixes phases on one GPU (better memory locality, no KV transfer), while disaggregation separates phases (better phase isolation, KV transfer overhead).

title: DeepSpeed-FastGen — Dynamic SplitFuse
summary_zh: Microsoft 獨立提出類似的 Dynamic SplitFuse chunking。與 Sarathi 形成對 PD disaggregation 的相同根本性取捨。
summary_en: Microsoft independently proposes similar Dynamic SplitFuse chunking. Presents the same fundamental trade-off against PD disaggregation as Sarathi.

title: Speculative Tool Calling
summary_zh: 透過 client-side 投機 instance 和 engine-side tool cache，重疊工具執行與生成。LLNL。
summary_en: Overlaps tool execution with generation via client-side speculative instances and engine-side tool cache. LLNL.

title: Speculative Actions — Lossless Agent Speedup
summary_zh: 推廣投機至整個 agentic 環境——投機 LLM 呼叫、工具 API、MCP 伺服器和人類回應，具有無損、as-if-sequential 語義。
summary_en: Generalizes speculation to entire agentic environments -- speculating LLM calls, tool APIs, MCP servers, and human responses, with lossless, as-if-sequential semantics.

title: ServerlessLLM — Fast Cold-start
summary_zh: 透過多層級 checkpoint loading、live migration 和 startup-optimized scheduling 實現 10–200× cold-start 延遲降低。對具有 bursty per-model 需求的多 agent 架構至關重要。
summary_en: Achieves 10–200x cold-start latency reduction through multi-tier checkpoint loading, live migration, and startup-optimized scheduling. Critical for multi-agent architectures with bursty per-model demand.

title: FlashInfer — Customizable Attention Engine
summary_zh: 基礎注意力引擎：block-sparse KV cache 格式、JIT 編譯的可客製化 template、負載均衡排程。29–69% inter-token-latency 降低。已整合至 SGLang、vLLM、MLC-Engine。MLSys'25 Best Paper。
summary_en: Foundational attention engine: block-sparse KV cache format, JIT-compiled customizable templates, load-balanced scheduling. 29–69% inter-token-latency reduction. Integrated into SGLang, vLLM, MLC-Engine. MLSys'25 Best Paper.

title: NEO — CPU Offloading for KV + Attention
summary_zh: 將 KV cache 和注意力計算 offload 到 CPU 以節省 GPU 記憶體。MLSys'25。
summary_en: Offloads KV cache and attention computation to CPU to save GPU memory. MLSys'25.

title: HCache — Fast KV State Restoration
summary_zh: 從中間 activation 恢復 KV 狀態，1.93× TTFT 降低。
summary_en: Restores KV state from intermediate activations, 1.93x TTFT reduction.

title: Pensieve — Stateful Multi-turn Serving
summary_zh: 多層級 KV cache 用於有狀態多輪 LLM serving。
summary_en: Multi-tier KV cache for stateful multi-turn LLM serving.

title: Helix — Heterogeneous GPU Max-Flow
summary_zh: 針對異質 GPU 叢集的 max-flow 優化。ASPLOS'25。
summary_en: Max-flow optimization for heterogeneous GPU clusters. ASPLOS'25.

title: Weaver — Multi-LLM Attention Offloading
summary_zh: 多 LLM serving 搭配注意力 offloading。
summary_en: Multi-LLM serving with attention offloading.
